## Summary
Brief overview of what this PR changes.

## TDD Evidence
### RED
- Which test(s) were added/updated first?
- What was the failing expectation?

### GREEN
- What minimal code was added to make tests pass?

### REFACTOR
- What cleanup was done after tests passed?

## Tests
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows project commit message format
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] No skipped tests without explanation
